title: CBCA compliance obligation pack
description: Draft operational schedules for core CBCA annual maintenance obligations.

sources.title: Corporate records and other corporate obligations
Individuals with significant control - File your information
Canada Business Corporations Act
sources.citation: Canada Business Corporations Act, R.S.C. 1985, c. C-44

rules.title: Annual return filing window
rules.summary: Track the annual return filing window from the corporation anniversary date to the operational due date.

checklist: Verify corporation number, anniversary date, registered office, directors, and key custody.
Prepare the annual return filing packet.
File through Corporations Canada or the approved service path.
Capture confirmation number, receipt, and any profile-report evidence.

rules.caveat: Operational date only; confirm current Corporations Canada filing instructions before submission.

rules.title: Annual financial statements workflow
rules.summary: Track annual financial-statement preparation against the fiscal year end.

checklist: Prepare annual financial statements.
Confirm shareholder delivery or waiver path.
Archive signed approvals, waivers, or meeting evidence.

rules.caveat: Meeting timing, waivers, exemptions, and filing history may change the practical workflow.

rules.title: First annual meeting deadline
rules.summary: Track the first annual meeting from the incorporation date.

checklist: Confirm first annual meeting deadline.
Prepare notice, agenda, and shareholder package.
Archive minutes or written resolutions.

rules.caveat: Use as an initial planning deadline; confirm exceptions and current status before relying on it.

rules.title: ISC register annual review
rules.summary: Review individuals with significant control, supporting notices, and change evidence at least annually.

checklist: Review shareholders, controllers, and significant-control thresholds.
Confirm notices or reasonable steps taken to update ISC information.
Update the ISC register or document that no changes were required.
Archive the review memo and supporting evidence.

rules.caveat: Use as an annual control-review reminder; confirm whether any public filing or exemption applies.

rules.title: Director change review
rules.summary: Review director changes, consents, register updates, and any Corporations Canada notice obligations.

checklist: Compare current directors against the director register and registry profile.
Confirm consents, resignations, appointments, or resolutions are archived.
Prepare and track any required director-change filing.
Link confirmation or profile evidence after filing.

rules.caveat: Review cadence is operational; actual filing deadlines depend on the specific director change.

rules.title: Registered office change review
rules.summary: Review registered office, records location, and any registry notice or articles amendment path.

authority.displayCitation: CBCA registered office and records guidance

checklist: Confirm registered office, records office/location, and mailing details.
Check whether the change requires a registry notice, articles update, or internal resolution.
Prepare and track any registered-office filing.
Archive profile or confirmation evidence after filing.

rules.caveat: Review cadence is operational; confirm current Corporations Canada requirements for the actual change.

rules.title: Corporation key custody review
rules.summary: Review custody of registry keys, authorized filers, backup custodians, and restricted evidence handling.

authority.displayCitation: CBCA annual filing and records guidance

checklist: Confirm who holds the corporation key or registry credential.
Review authorized filers and backup custodian access.
Store key custody evidence in restricted records.
Record any access change or missing credential remediation.

rules.caveat: Operational custody control only; do not store secrets in ordinary notes or public records.

rules.title: ISC change filing deadline
rules.summary: Track a 15-day filing workflow after becoming aware of changes to the ISC register.

checklist: Confirm the date the corporation became aware of the ISC change.
Update the ISC register and supporting control records.
File the updated ISC information through Corporations Canada if required.
Archive confirmation and the updated ISC register.

rules.caveat: Triggered only when an ISC change date is available in the workspace facts.

rules.title: Initial ISC filing workflow
rules.summary: Track initial ISC setup and filing from incorporation, amalgamation, or continuance.

authority.displayCitation: Corporations Canada ISC initial filing guidance

checklist: Create the initial ISC register or document why no ISC was identified.
Collect shareholder and controller evidence.
File initial ISC information through the required Corporations Canada path.
Archive confirmation and source evidence.

rules.caveat: Use incorporation date as the default operational anchor; validate amalgamation and continuance timelines separately.

rules.title: Director change filing deadline
rules.summary: Track a 15-day filing workflow after a director change or director address change.

checklist: Confirm appointment, resignation, or address-change evidence.
Update the director register and minute-book records.
File the director change through Corporations Canada if required.
Archive confirmation and updated registry profile evidence.

rules.caveat: Triggered only when a director change date is available in the workspace facts.

rules.title: Registered office change filing deadline
rules.summary: Track a 15-day filing workflow after a registered office change.

checklist: Confirm registered office and records location details.
Update internal records and resolutions where required.
File the registered office change through Corporations Canada if required.
Archive confirmation and profile evidence.

rules.caveat: Triggered only when a registered office change date is available in the workspace facts.

rules.title: Corporate records completeness review
rules.summary: Review CBCA minute-book and corporate records completeness annually.

checklist: Confirm articles, by-laws, resolutions, filed notices, and registers are archived.
Review share and securities registers against the equity ledger.
Review ISC register and supporting control evidence.
Record corrective tasks for missing records.

rules.caveat: Operational review cadence only; inspection and retention duties depend on record type.
